calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Mar-16-2026 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Feb-09-2026 Continued To Mar-16-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Nancy Lofdhal, Esq., for Claudio Magobet, Administrator.

Counsel reports on the Status of the Estate and of it's proximity to being closed.

At the conclusion of testimony, the matter is continued to Mar-16-2026 at 9:00 AM in Dept. 204. Counsel is advised that should the Estate not be ready to be closed before the next calling, they are to file a Petition to Approve Report of Status of Administration.

Judge: Hon. Michael McNaughton. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not Reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Jan-12-2026 Continued To Feb-09-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Nov-17-2025 Continued To Jan-12-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Nancy Lofdahl for administrator Claudio Magobet (via Zoom).

The matter was called for hearing on Status on Close of Estate.

Ms. Lofdahl stated that the parties are still working toward a settlement and need additional time to meet with beneficiaries and finalize key terms, including valuation of the house and reimbursement amounts. She requested an additional continuance.

Following discussion, the Court continued the matter to January 12, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Oct-08-2025 Continued To Nov-17-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Nancy Lofdahl for administrator Claudio Magobet (via Zoom).

The matter was called for hearing on Status on Close of Estate.

Ms. Lofdahl requested a 6-week continuance to allow time to finalize an agreement with heirs on ownership interests and credits owed to the administrator for funds advanced. She anticipated filing a petition for final distribution upon completion of that agreement.

The Court continued the matter to November 17, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Dec-30-2024 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Apr-24-2024 Continued To Dec-30-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Nancy Lofdahl appeared via zoom for Claudio Magobet (administrator).

Ms. Lofdahl reports that the Civil matter is still pending, that she requests to put this matter over until the Civil suit is resolved. Matter is continued to December 30, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Counsel to provide update two weeks prior to hearing.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Aquino. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Apr-15-2024 Continued To Apr-24-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jan-22-2024 Continued To Apr-15-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Nancy Lofdahl appeared by zoom for Claudio Magobet (administrator).

The court stated that it does not see an inventory and appraisal, or a petition to close the estate or a request for additional time to administer the estate. Mrs. Lofdahl stated that the only asset was a house that was owned by the mother, that the decedent got the house transferred into his name and took out a reverse mortgage, that before her death, the mother filed a civil action against the decedent and the lender, and that it is still pending. Mrs. Lofdahl also stated that the intent is to file a petition for the grandmother to be substituted in and that they will file a petition to close the estate for lack of assets. Status on close of estate is continued to April 15, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Oct-09-2023 Continued To Jan-22-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Nancy Lofdahl appeared via zoom for Claudio Magobet (petitioner).

Ms. Lofdahl stated that one of the heirs died unexpectedly, and that the Civil case is still pending creditors claim. Status hearing on close of estate is continued to January 22, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross Moody: Clerk: A. Datt: Deputy: Napata: Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jun-07-2023 Continued To Oct-09-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Nancy Lofdahl appearing via zoom for Claudio Magobet (administrator).

Mrs. Lofdahl presented oral arguments to the court in regard to the reverse mortgage and a pending civil case. Status of hearing on close of estate is continued to October 09, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross Moody. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Maloney. Not reported.
